Data Processing Addendum (VN) between Solstice Holdings JSC (Công ty Cổ phần Solstice Holdings) as Controller and CloudPine Data Services Co., Ltd. as Processor for employee, investor, banking, and transaction datasets in Vietnam.
Under Decree 13, Personal Data means information associated with or helping identify a specific person; Processor shall handle HR records, trader activity logs, wallet identifiers, and onboarding files only on documented instructions.
Contact for data subjects and regulators: Data Protection Officer Ms. Lê Thủy Ánh, dpo@solstice.vn, 1900 555 835, 123 Hoa Phượng Lane, Ward 99, Quận Đông, Thành phố Vạn Phúc.
MNPI is treated per Vietnamese Securities Law as non-public issuer/securities information with potential price impact, including draft ESG-linked bond terms, pre-earnings figures, and internal cyber incident assessments affecting listed instruments of Solstice.
Information barriers: Processor must segregate deal teams and operations; insider lists shall record staff with access to the sustainability-linked bond coupon range (3.2–3.8%) and the crypto wallet integration timeline for the Hoàn Thịnh Securities Exchange (HTSX) listing project.
Blackout windows and tipping: Employees and contractors are prohibited from trading Solstice shares during blackout windows and from selective disclosure to analysts or VC funds until public announcement on HTSX.
Cyber incident workflow: If a breach in the treasury payment API or custodian bank connector is suspected, Processor must notify Controller within 24 hours and refrain from external communications until the Vietnamese securities regulator authorizes disclosure.
Commercial terms: Non-public fee schedules for carbon-offset procurement and green loan covenants with An Phú River Bank are classified MNPI; access is restricted to a clean team under the information barrier.
Crypto/DPT operations: Solstice pilots tokenized carbon credits and internal custody of client DPT wallets; no marketing materials may reference deal-stage wallet migration or exchange connectivity before public filing.
Transfers: Cross-border processing to CloudPine Singapore and storage at CloudPine Hà Nội Datacenter requires a transfer impact assessment, retention of a copy in Vietnam, and a log of recipient jurisdictions per Decree 13.
DSAR handling: Data subjects may submit access, correction, deletion, or consent withdrawal requests via privacy@solstice.vn; we acknowledge within 72 hours and complete within 30 days, with one reasonable extension for complex requests.
Retention: Employee PII tied to trading restrictions and insider lists is retained for 5 years after event closure; raw system logs from cyber incident triage are retained for 18 months, then anonymized.
Educational use: Staff training includes examples using “insider list,” “blackout window,” and “ESG” terminology for learning purposes only and does not involve live MNPI.
Operations-only materials: The helpdesk knowledge base offers a generic crypto wallet password reset guide and ESG reporting checklists that do not reference any issuer-specific or price-sensitive details.
Audit and accountability: Controller may audit Processor’s barrier controls quarterly; breaches of this DPA may result in suspension of processing and contractual remedies, in addition to obligations under Vietnamese law.
